om_sql:
select veterinaire.nom as nom,
veterinaire.prenom as prenom,
civilite.libelle as civilité,
veterinaire.telephone as telephone
from &DB_PREFIXEveterinaire left join &DB_PREFIXEcivilite on civilite.civilite = veterinaire.civilite where veterinaire.clinique='&idx'

select soin.soin as id,
veterinaire.nom as veterinaire,
clinique.nom as clinique,
soin.date_soin as date,
soin.posologie as posologie
from &DB_PREFIXEsoin left join &DB_PREFIXEveterinaire on veterinaire.veterinaire = soin.veterinaire left join &DB_PREFIXEclinique on soin.clinique = clinique.clinique where soin.animal='&idx'

select medicament.medicament as ID,
medicament.nom as nom,
concat(medicament.dose,unite_mesure.unite_mesure) as dose,
medicament.date_debut as date_debut,
medicament.date_fin as date_fin,
medicament.frequence as fréquence from &DB_PREFIXEmedicament left join &DB_PREFIXEunite_mesure on medicament.unite_mesure = unite_mesure.unite_mesure where medicament.soin='&idx'

select sejour.sejour as ID,
sejour.date_entree as date_entree,
sejour.date_sortie as date_sortie,
sejour.provenance as provenance,
sejour.hebergement as hebergement,
sejour_tarif.prix as tarif,
sejour.paye as payé
from &DB_PREFIXEsejour left join &DB_PREFIXEsejour_tarif on sejour_tarif.sejour_tarif = sejour.sejour_tarif where sejour.animal='&idx'

select medicament.medicament as ID,
medicament.nom as nom,
medicament.date_debut as date_debut,
medicament.date_fin as date_fin,
concat(medicament.dose, unite_mesure.libelle)  as dose,
medicament.frequence as fréquence,
medicament.soin as ID_soin
from &DB_PREFIXEmedicament left join &DB_PREFIXEunite_mesure on medicament.unite_mesure = unite_mesure.unite_mesure where medicament.animal='&idx'

select 
facture_soin.soin as id,
animal.nom as animal,
facture_soin.date_soin as date_soin,
concat(veterinaire.nom,' ',veterinaire.prenom) as veterinaire,
clinique.nom as clinique,
round(coalesce(facture_soin.tarif, 0)::numeric,2) as prix
from &DB_PREFIXEfacture_soin left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal on facture_soin.animal = animal.animal left join &DB_PREFIXEveterinaire on facture_soin.veterinaire = veterinaire.veterinaire left join &DB_PREFIXEclinique on facture_soin.clinique = clinique.clinique
where facture_soin.facture='&idx' order by facture_soin.animal

select sejour.sejour as ID,
sejour.animal as ID_animal,
animal.nom as animal,
sejour.provenance as provenance,
sejour.date_entree as date_d_entree,
sejour.date_sortie as date_de_sortie
from &DB_PREFIXEsejour left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal on animal.animal = sejour.animal where sejour.hebergement='&idx'

select soin.soin as id,
soin_type.libelle as type,
soin.date_soin as date,
soin.posologie as posologie,
soin.animal as ID_animal,
clinique.nom as clinique from &DB_PREFIXEsoin left join &DB_PREFIXEclinique on clinique.clinique = soin.clinique left join &DB_PREFIXEsoin_type on soin_type.soin_type = soin.soin_type where soin.veterinaire='&idx'

select animal.animal as ID,
animal.nom as nom,
animal_espece.nom as espece,
animal_race.nom as race,
animal.date_naissance as date_de_naissance,
animal_sexe.libelle as animal_sexe
from &DB_PREFIXEanimal left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_espece on animal_espece.animal_espece = animal.animal_espece left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_race on animal_race.animal_race = animal.animal_race left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_sexe on animal_sexe.animal_sexe = animal.animal_sexe where animal.personne='&idx'

select 
facture_sejour.sejour as sejour,
animal.nom as animal,
facture_sejour.date_entree as date_entree,
facture_sejour.date_sortie as date_sortie,
provenance.libelle as provenance,
hebergement.nom as hebergement,
sejour_tarif.prix  as tarif,
facture_sejour.date_sortie - facture_sejour.date_entree as nb_jours,
round(coalesce((facture_sejour.date_sortie - facture_sejour.date_entree) * sejour_tarif.prix, 0)::numeric,2) as somme
from &DB_PREFIXEfacture_sejour left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal on facture_sejour.animal = animal.animal left join &DB_PREFIXEsejour_tarif on sejour_tarif.sejour_tarif = facture_sejour.sejour_tarif left join &DB_PREFIXEprovenance on provenance.provenance = facture_sejour.provenance left join &DB_PREFIXEhebergement on hebergement.hebergement = facture_sejour.hebergement where facture_sejour.facture='&idx' order by facture_sejour.animal
